member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Attributes.OpeDecimalAttribute
member.summary: Marks a decimal property for OPE encoding. The value is scaled by the specified fractional width and stored as an order-preserving encoded string.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Attributes.OpeEncodedAttribute
member.summary: Marks a string property for OPE encoding. The value is stored as an order-preserving encoded string in the database column.

member.name: P:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Attributes.OpeEncodedAttribute.MaxLength
member.summary: Maximum plaintext length. When set, the database column is sized to MaxLength * 6 characters. Set to 0 (default) for unspecified.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Attributes.OpeIntegerAttribute
member.summary: Marks a long/int property for OPE encoding. The numeric value is zero-padded and stored as an order-preserving encoded string.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Extensions.DbContextOptionsBuilderExtensions.UseSecureOrmTranslations(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptionsBuilder,SecureORM.Core.Encoding.OPEEncoder)
member.summary: Registers the OPE LINQ query translator so that OpeStartsWith() and OpeInRange() methods are translated to native SQL.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Extensions.ModelBuilderExtensions.ApplyOpeEncodings(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder,SecureORM.Core.Encoding.OPEEncoder)
member.summary: Scans all registered entity types for [OpeEncoded], [OpeInteger], and [OpeDecimal] attributes and wires up the appropriate value converters. Supports string, long, int, short, decimal, float, and double property types. Call this in OnModelCreating.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddSecureOrm(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Configuration.OpeEncodingOptions})
member.summary: Registers the OPE encoding services (OpeEncoderFactory, OPEEncoder, OpeQueryHelper).

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeDbContextOptionsExtension
member.summary: EF Core options extension that registers the OPE LINQ method call translator.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeMethodCallTranslator
member.summary: Translates OpeQueryExtensions marker methods into SQL expressions.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions
member.summary: LINQ marker methods for OPE queries. These translate to SQL via the OPE IMethodCallTranslator — they throw if called directly in C#. Register with UseSecureOrmTranslations() on DbContextOptionsBuilder.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions.OpeStartsWith(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translates to SQL: WHERE column LIKE 'encoded_prefix%'

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions.OpeInRange(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Translates to SQL: WHERE column >= encoded_low AND column <= encoded_high

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions.OpeInRange(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Translates to SQL: WHERE column >= encoded_low AND column <= encoded_high

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions.OpeInRange(System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal)
member.summary: Translates to SQL: WHERE column >= encoded_low AND column <= encoded_high

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Linq.OpeQueryExtensions.OpeInRange(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Translates to SQL: WHERE column >= encoded_low AND column <= encoded_high

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Migration.KeyRotationProgress
member.summary: Reports progress during key rotation.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Migration.KeyRotationProgress.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Reports progress during key rotation.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Migration.OpeKeyRotator
member.summary: Re-encodes all OPE-encoded data from one key to another. Operates in batches within a transaction for safety.
Re-encodes all rows in a table, decoding with the old encoder and re-encoding with the new encoder.
member.param: The DbContext with an open connection.
Encoder initialized with the old key.
Encoder initialized with the new key.
Column names and their encoding types. Key = column name, Value = encoding type.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.Migration.ColumnEncodingType
member.summary: Encoding type for a column, used during key rotation.

member.name: T:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.OpeQueryHelper
member.summary: Pre-encodes query parameters for use in LINQ expressions against OPE-encoded columns. Use this for prefix search and range queries where EF Core cannot auto-apply the converter.

member.name: M:SecureORM.EntityFrameworkCore.OpeQueryHelper.EncodePrefixLike(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the encoded prefix with a SQL LIKE wildcard appended (e.g. "encoded%"). Use directly in FromSqlRaw LIKE clauses.
